text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That race was incredible! I ran as fast as I could,
and my body was red-hot!
choice_data_list:
Let's not get carried away and start preparing
for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! It's all thanks to your
guidance!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I feel totally unstoppable right now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm counting on you to keep pushing me to be the
very best!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Right! After all, my next opponent might be even
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Okay, that's enough celebrating! Starting
tomorrow, we aim for even greater heights!
